title: FABRIC GLUE 50ml
features: SEAMLESS FABRIC GLUE - Fabric glue for sewing box, perfect for most fabric repairs and alterations. Simple, quick and easy altertive to needle and thread use
Washable Glue: fabric glue for sewing box, strong, quick-drying, flexible, waterproof for fabric that can withstand machine washing and ironing

EASY CHANGES - Use glue for sewing box fabric, for hemming or sealing clothes, soft furniture and curtains. Use in craft projects, perfect for patchwork, adding badges to clothing can beanies, all without threading a needle
About the product: sewing box 50ml multi-purpose fabric glue
description: EXTRA STRONG SEW QUICK FABRIC GLUE MADE BY SEWING BOX BONDS QUICKLY - EXTRA STRONG EASIER THAN SEWING FOR HEMMING AND REPAIRS! HANDY ALTERNATIVE TO NEEDLE AND THREAD IDEAL FOR HEMMING, MAKING SOFT TOYS, PATCHING ETC CAN BE DRY CLEANED OR MACHINE WASHED USE ON SUEDE, LEATHER, COTTON, BLENDED AND SYNTHETIC FIBERS. This item is brand NEW and retail packaged! !
